scripts.test:runtime-identity: node -e "const id=(h,p)=>String(h||'').trim().toLowerCase()+'::'+String(p||'').trim().toLowerCase(); const key=i=>'jarvis.chatWindows.v1::'+encodeURIComponent(i); const a=id('D:\\jarvis\\old','gemma4-turbo'); const b=id('D:\\jarvis\\new','gemma4-turbo'); if(a===b) process.exit(1); if(key(a)===key(b)) process.exit(2); if(key(a).includes(encodeURIComponent(a))===false) process.exit(3); console.log('runtime-identity-ok');"
scripts.test:stream-placeholder: node -e "const empty=(l)=>l.role==='assistant'&&!String(l.content||'').trim()&&(!!l.pending||l.durationMs===0||l.durationMs==null); const drop=ls=>ls.filter(l=>!empty(l)); const before=[{role:'user',content:'hi'},{role:'assistant',content:'',pending:true,durationMs:0},{role:'assistant',content:'ok',pending:false,durationMs:12}]; const after=drop(before); if(after.length!==2) process.exit(1); if(after.some(empty)) process.exit(2); if(drop([{role:'assistant',content:'x',pending:true}]).length!==1) process.exit(3); console.log('stream-placeholder-ok');"
